user.description: Set up the Modbus TCP connection to the ventilation unit (directly or through a gateway).

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the unit or gateway.
data_description.port: TCP port of the Modbus endpoint (default 502).
data_description.framer: Native Modbus TCP, or RTU over TCP for transparent serial gateways.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check that the ventilation unit is reachable at the given host, port and unit.
